CacheBaseName

Name used for generating the CacheFileName. GUID is used if this is not specified.

virtual string CacheBaseName { get; set; }

Returns

string

CacheLocation

Location where the item cache gets generated. This could be a workspace name or a table name

virtual IName CacheLocation { get; set; }

Returns

IName

Sample Snippet

ClippingGeometry

The clipping geometry that defines regions of valid pixels. This geometry may have a coordinate system different from the corresponding dataset.

virtual IGeometry ClippingGeometry { get; set; }

Returns
